executives.name: Sam Ataya
executives.background: Mr. Ataya has over 30 years of experience in the management and development of private and public companies. He has served as the Executive Chairman and CEO of Western Magnesium since 2018.

tenure_dates.title: Executive Chairman and Chief Executive Officer

executives.name: Edward Lee
executives.background: Mr. Lee is a Chartered Professional Accountant with over 25 years of experience in financial reporting and corporate finance for public companies.
